# Star Stucco of Austin

> Star Stucco of Austin is a stucco and plaster contractor serving Central Texas since 2013. We specialize in residential stucco, commercial stucco, EIFS, interior plaster, stone veneer, and stucco repair. Over 9,000 projects completed. Family-owned, no subcontractors. Available 24/7.

## Services

- [Residential Stucco Installation](https://stuccoaustin.com/austin-stucco-installation): New construction stucco and re-stucco for Austin-area homes.
- [Commercial Stucco](https://stuccoaustin.com/austin-commercial-stucco): Professional stucco for retail, office, and multi-family buildings.
- [Stucco Repair](https://stuccoaustin.com/austin-stucco-repair): Crack repair, water damage restoration, and patching for residential and commercial properties.
- [EIFS Contractor](https://stuccoaustin.com/eifs-contractor-austin): Exterior Insulation and Finish Systems installation, repair, and remediation.
- [Interior Plaster & Finishing](https://stuccoaustin.com/austin-stucco-finishing): Custom plaster finishes, stucco textures, and decorative coatings.
- [Stucco Remediation](https://stuccoaustin.com/austin-stucco-remediation): Moisture remediation and full stucco system replacement.
- [Stucco Installation](https://stuccoaustin.com/stucco-installation-austin-tx): New stucco systems for homes and commercial buildings.
- [Stucco Finishing & Textures](https://stuccoaustin.com/stucco-finishing-austin-tx): Custom stucco finishes including smooth, Santa Barbara, dash, and lace.
- [Stucco Re-Coat & Color Coat](https://stuccoaustin.com/stucco-recoat-austin-tx): Refresh faded or aging stucco without full replacement.
- [Exterior Stucco](https://stuccoaustin.com/exterior-stucco-austin-tx): Full-service exterior stucco contractor for residential and commercial.
- [Stucco Inspection](https://stuccoaustin.com/stucco-inspection-austin-tx): Comprehensive stucco assessments and moisture testing.

## Service Area

Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Georgetown, Pflugerville, Westlake, Lakeway, Bee Cave, Dripping Springs, Kyle, and surrounding Central Texas counties including Travis, Williamson, Hays, Bell, Bastrop, Burnet, Comal, Blanco, Gillespie, Caldwell, Lee, Milam, Brazos, and McLennan counties.

## Contact

- Phone: (512) 706-9699
- Email: info@starstuccoaustin.com
- Address: 5316 W US Hwy 290 Service Rd, Austin, TX 78735
- Website: https://stuccoaustin.com
- Hours: 24/7

## Certifications

Certified applicators for Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra. Members of EIMA, TLPCA, and the Stucco Manufacturers Association. OSHA-trained, CPR-trained, and scaffold-trained professionals.
